name: Account Update
description:
hi guys (I AM NOT QUITTING OR DELETING MY BOTS )

I hate announcement bots as much as everyone else but also want to get some clarity around this account since it's obviously pretty inactive.

Whether you know that Io and I are collaborators or assume we're the same person (understandable), we've made the decision to make io's account the one that hosts all new Ioverse content (including my OCs for their verses!) and my account the one for alts and old versions of bots.

...Which isn't that functionally different from what it's always been, but you may see some changes and old iorveth's bots reposted here.

Primarily:

- my graves/COD/fandom bots will be privated and moved to iorveth's fandom account, roches. I expect to get around to this sometime next month.

- any revamped ioverse characters (currently, this will mostly be post apoc) will have their original versions posted here for preservation purposes, or have their alts updated with their original starting message

- I will still host alts (you will see a few posted soon!) alts posted here typically deviate strongly enough from their original bot where the bot personality itself is changed (otherwise, we'll simply do alternate intros :-) ) OR are commissions.

MAJOR AUs (i.e, modfan versions of post apoc characters, pre-outbreak Nate/Luke) will be posted on Iorveths as functionally they're separate characters from their OG versions.

that's all really!

Just wanted to make it clear for future posts that this is moving away from a mixed account to exclusively alts/hosting 'classic' versions of ioverse bots.

My existing OC bots (from exchanges, siebren, my starfall AU keepers etc) will stay on this account. Revamped versions of my canon OCs (irvine, otto, nineteen, stark, etc) will be posted on Iorveth's when we start posting revamped Post Apoc.

I'm still active collabing with io, just also busy with the responsibility of Full Time EmploymentTM. You can usually find me in the art channels on our 18+ discord server.

Hope you all are well, and again sorry for the blogpost bot!!
creator: veseii
